arts.ttl: Chris Wilder makes Tom Cannon admission ahead of Stoke City reunion
arts.sum: Chris Wilder insists Tom Cannon is going to be a good player for Sheffield United after seeing the striker break his scoring duck. Cannon scored 11 times on loan for Stoke City in the first half of the season before being summoned back by Leicester to be sold on to Sheffield United for about £10 million, hoping he could fire them to the Premier League.
